<om-film><style>.headline { color: #d7ff43; font-size: 80px; }
#hero { background: #111; }</style><om-scene><om-shot id="hero"><video src="hero.mp4"></video><om-title class="headline">Compile what you mean.</om-title></om-shot></om-scene></om-film>

<om-film><style>#one { background: red; }
#two { background: blue; }
#three { background: green; }</style><om-scene><om-shot id="one"><video src="one.mp4"></video><om-title>One</om-title></om-shot><om-shot id="two"><video src="two.mp4"></video><om-title>Two</om-title></om-shot><om-shot id="three"><video src="three.mp4"></video><om-title>Three</om-title></om-shot></om-scene></om-film>
